xp.title: Experience System (XP)
xp.desc1: The experience system (XP) is a tool to visualize your progress as a conscious buyer. Points do not give in-game advantages. Currently, XP is awarded only for two actions: going to the store and manually adding a game to the library.
xp.desc2: The current level starts with a threshold of {{initial}} XP. Upon leveling up, the threshold increases by {{multiplier}} times.

actions.add: Manually adding a game to library

ethics.title: Responsible Development Code
ethics.subtitle: We design VELO based on four principles:
ethics.p1: Transparency: No hidden advertising algorithms. Only objective data.
ethics.p2: Data Minimization: We collect only technical IDs necessary for operation.
ethics.p3: Conscious Choice: Gamification is an option that can be ignored.
ethics.p4: Freedom from Manipulation: Rejection of dark patterns and artificial pressure on the user.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data Processing
privacy.desc: We use an ELT pipeline (Extract, Load, Transform) for data processing. We do not store PII (Personally Identifiable Information); instead, we perform anonymization and remove anomalies in the cloud to ensure analytics accuracy without violating user privacy.

stores.title: Supported Stores
stores.desc: We aggregate data only from official and verified stores. We do not support the gray market and key resellers.
stores.steam: The main PC gaming store. Prices are requested directly or converted.
stores.epic: Store from Epic Games. Known for free giveaways and exclusives.
stores.gog: Store from CD Projekt. All games are sold DRM-free (without protection).
stores.humble: Store where part of the profits goes to charity.
stores.gmg: Official UK retailer of keys for various platforms.
stores.fanatical: Official key store known for its bundles.
stores.gamersgate: One of the oldest digital distribution stores.
stores.gamesplanet: European store with official keys for Steam, Ubisoft, etc.

sources.title: Data Sources
sources.desc_before: All price and discount data in the application is provided via the
sources.desc_after: API. We thank the CheapShark team for supporting open data and helping gamers find the best deals.

clear_cache.title: Clear Cache & Logout
clear_cache.desc: Deletes local caches and terminates the account session.

empty.library_desc: Go to the store to find the best deals and sync games.
empty.wishlist_desc: Add games to wishlist to track their deals.

deal.title: Huge discount on {{title}}!
deal.desc: Discount {{savings}}%! "{{title}}" and many other popular games can be grabbed at a very favorable price right now.

level.title: You have reached Level {{level}}!
level.desc: Your authority is growing. {{xp}} XP left until the next level. Keep building your library!

welcome.title: Welcome to VELO!
welcome.desc: You have successfully logged into the system. Now your library and level are securely saved in the cloud.

next_step.label: Next Step
next_step.desc: Direct integration with Epic Games Store to get accurate prices and expansion of the list of supported regions.

hero.desc: Get the maximum: auto-updates, background downloading, and game overlay in our native client. Install VELO right now.
hero.browser_support: Automatic installation is supported in Chromium-based browsers (Chrome, Edge, Yandex, Opera).

alert.not_supported: Unfortunately, your browser (e.g., Firefox or Safari) does not support automatic PWA installation on desktop. Please open the site in Chrome, Edge, or Yandex Browser to install the application.

launcher.title: Unified Launcher
launcher.desc: All your games in one place

offline_warning.title: Warning: Offline Mode
offline_warning.desc: Internet connection may be missing. Showing cached data.

offline_warning.title: Warning: Offline Mode
offline_warning.desc: Internet connection may be missing. Showing cached data.

empty.start_typing: Start typing the game title in the search bar.

game.default_description: Detailed description is available in the selected store.
game.warning: Before purchasing from third-party stores, make sure that the key activates in your region and for your launcher.
game.no_active_deals: No active deals at the moment
game.redirect_info: Redirect leads to the store storefront. To save the game to your library, use the "Add to library" button.

region_modal.title: Select Region
region_modal.subtitle: For accurate Steam prices
region_modal.desc: Select your region (or your Steam account region) so we can show relevant prices and discounts:
region_modal.footer: You can always change the region in profile settings.

changelog.title: Update
changelog.subtitle: Version {{version}}
changelog.desc: We have seriously upgraded VELO! Here is what's new:
items: Fixed display of Steam regional prices on hosting.
Added option to manually select region in settings for accurate price calculation.
Optimized proxy server for faster data loading.
Fixed offset of the "Open" button in the stores list.
Added one-time region request on first login for price personalization.

auth.hero_desc: Compare prices, find historical lows, and get XP for every game in your collection.
